subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness. Rejoice thou in My remembrance of thee. By the life of God! The shells of the sea cannot rival My utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی علیک بهآئی و عنایتی ابشری بذکری ایاک لعمر الله لا یعادل ببیانی اصداف البحر
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @personal instructions
